title: Implement manager provider-candidate and assignment endpoints
description: Add backend endpoints for manager handoff flow: fetch provider candidates for a property and assign provider with deterministic role/session/validation handling.
acceptance_criteria: API exposes manager-scoped provider candidate listing and provider assignment mutation for property context
Validation and conflict responses use stable envelopes suitable for mobile handoff UX
Feature tests cover success, no-candidates/invalid-provider, forbidden role, and session-invalid paths
